title: Demon Slayer: Breath of Nichirin
body:
# Welcome to Demon Slayer: Breath of Nichirin.

 

![Mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e4e807554dd4324b77b242b2672363f1bd80328.png)


Demon Slayer: Breath of Nichirin brings the world of Demon Slayer into Minecraft. Fight demons, master breathing styles, and grow stronger as you progress. Craft your nichirin sword, learn powerful techniques, and face dangerous foes in a fast-paced, stylish combat system, all while staying true to the spirit of the series.
It is supposed to be an immersive and well rounded mod, that supports pvp and pve.

![Nichirin sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1939ae3c85ffbb5d9d38f4c18a3f741ad7435ac9.png)

Want updates, sneak peeks, and to contribute? Join the Discord.
I post updates, sneak peeks, reveals, and a lot of stuff in there. You can meet new people, suggest things, and be a part of the community.

DISCORD LINK HERE
## [DISCORD LINK HERE](https://discord.gg/2vPV7QPNQ8)
